codeReview.summary: BGE cross-encoder reranking NOT implemented. The RerankerModelType::Bge variant exists but falls through to SimpleReranker. No actual BGE reranker implementation exists - no ONNX model loading, no transformer-based cross-encoder scoring, no actual BGE model integration.

issues.description: RerankerModelType::Bge falls through to SimpleReranker. The match statement shows 'RerankerModelType::Simple | RerankerModelType::Bge => CrossEncoderService::with_simple_reranker(reranker_config)' - BGE uses the exact same SimpleReranker as the Simple variant. No actual BGE implementation exists.

The file header claims 'BGE-reranker-v2-m3 model (278M parameters) provides state-of-the-art reranking performance' but no BGE model is actually loaded or used. Only SimpleReranker (keyword overlap + phrase matching + term density) is implemented.

CrossEncoderConfig has fields for BGE (model_name: Some('BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3'), onnx_model_path: None) but these are never used. The config fields suggest BGE support but the code never implements it.

summary: Feature 'mem-cross-encoder-rerank' FAILS review. The implementation does NOT provide BGE cross-encoder reranking as specified in the feature description. While the code includes a RerankerModelType::Bge variant and BGE-related configuration fields, the Bge variant is wired to use SimpleReranker - a keyword-based fallback, not an actual transformer-based cross-encoder. The feature description explicitly requires 'Cross-encoder reranking with BGE' but only SimpleReranker exists.
